calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Continued To Sep-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for Karen Vernon (administrator).

Ms. Ebey stated that she been having a hard time getting in touch with her client, that her client lives in Alaska, and that she is waiting for her to sign the declaration. The matter is continued to September 24, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared via zoom for Karen Ann Vernon (administrator).

Ms. Ebey stated that she would like to close out the estate due to no value in California and that she will contact the examiner to clear the notes. The matter is continued to July 16, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Rene A. Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Apr-07-2025 Continued To May-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Continued To Nov-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for administrator.

The court noted that an inventory and appraisal showing zero on it was filed on Friday. Discussion was held regarding the requirement of Probate Code 12251 to file a petition for termination of proceedings. Status on close of estate is continued to November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: E. Melendez. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated June 09, 1988 is admitted to probate. Karen Ann Vernon is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
